name: Vivus.js — SVG Path Drawing Animation
description: Animates inline SVGs so each path draws itself stroke-by-stroke. Triggers when SVG scrolls into view. Add id to any inline SVG.
head:
<style>
  [data-vivus] svg path, [data-vivus] svg circle, [data-vivus] svg polyline, [data-vivus] svg line {
    fill: none;
    stroke-width: 2;
  }
</style>
body:
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/vivus@0.4.6/dist/vivus.min.js"></script>
<script>
  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
    document.querySelectorAll('[data-vivus]').forEach(function (el) {
      var svg = el.querySelector('svg') || (el.tagName === 'SVG' ? el : null);
      if (!svg || !svg.id) { svg.id = 'vivus-' + Math.random().toString(36).slice(2); }
      var observer = new IntersectionObserver(function(entries) {
        entries.forEach(function(e) {
          if (!e.isIntersecting) return;
          observer.unobserve(e.target);
          new Vivus(svg.id, { type: 'oneByOne', duration: 150, animTimingFunction: Vivus.EASE_OUT });
        });
      }, { threshold: 0.3 });
      observer.observe(el);
    });
  });
</script>
